name: PutBlob
description: Uploads a local file as a blob to Azure Storage using OIDC from the selected AzureRM service connection.
helpMarkDown: Uses serviceConnectionARM to request OIDC token and upload blob via Azure Storage REST API.
author: Slawomir Koszewski

inputs.name: serviceConnectionARM
inputs.label: Azure Resource Manager service connection
inputs.helpMarkDown: AzureRM service connection used to request OIDC token and resolve tenant/client metadata. Requires System.AccessToken to be available to the job.

inputs.name: blobName
inputs.label: Blob Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Blob path/name to create or overwrite.

inputs.name: contentType
inputs.label: Content Type
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional HTTP content type for uploaded blob.
